channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Boulanger retire 200 € à ce PC portable (AMD Ryzen 7, 16 Go de RAM, RTX 5070) idéal pour les gamers et les créatifs
item.description: Le Gigabyte Aero X16 est un PC portable puissant, mais léger pour être transporté facilement. Chez Boulanger, il s'allège de 200 euros grâce au code GAMER100 et passe de 1 599,99 euros à 1 399,99 euros.

item.title: 5 signs you’re doing work that doesn’t matter
item.description: Real value comes from impact and growth. These five warning signs reveal when your hard work is missing both—and what to do instead. In recent years, nearly half of employees report increased workloads and an accelerating pace of change, so the last thing anyone can afford is doing hard work that doesn’t make an impact. Ambitious workers aren’t afraid of putting in effort, but they want it to contribute to work that matters....
